'''gabate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rifely|rifely]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-b-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rifely|rifely]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| gabate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:gabate|gabate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gabatesher|gabatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gabatesherĂ«m|gabatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gabatero|gabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gabateshĂ«|gabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gabateshĂ«m|gabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigabatero|gokigabatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigabateshĂ«|gokigabateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigabateshĂ«m|gokigabateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogabankerom|gogabankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogabankeshĂ«|gogabankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogabankeshĂ«m|gogabankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogabankeya|gogabankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gabaterom|gabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gabatemu|gabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gabateya|gabateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigabaterom|gokigabaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigabatemu|gokigabatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigabateya|gokigabateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:gababate|gababate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gababatesher|gababatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gababatesherĂ«m|gababatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gababatero|gababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gababateshĂ«|gababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gababateshĂ«m|gababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigababatero|gokigababatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigababateshĂ«|gokigababateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigababateshĂ«m|gokigababateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogababankerom|gogababankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogababankeshĂ«|gogababankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogababankeshĂ«m|gogababankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogababankeya|gogababankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gababaterom|gababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gababatemu|gababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gababateya|gababateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigababaterom|gokigababaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigababatemu|gokigababatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigababateya|gokigababateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠte|gĂŠbĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠtesher|gĂŠbĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m|gĂŠbĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠtero|gĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠtero|gokigĂŠbĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«|gokigĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m|gokigĂŠbĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogĂŠbĂŠnkerom|gogĂŠbĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«|gogĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gogĂŠbĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogĂŠbĂŠnkeya|gogĂŠbĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠterom|gĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠtemu|gĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gĂŠbĂŠteya|gĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠterom|gokigĂŠbĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠtemu|gokigĂŠbĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigĂŠbĂŠteya|gokigĂŠbĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:gafbafte|gafbafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:gafbaftesher|gafbaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafbaftesherĂ«m|gafbaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafbaftero|gafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gafbafteshĂ«|gafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafbafteshĂ«m|gafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafbaftero|gokigafbaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokigafbafteshĂ«|gokigafbafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafbafteshĂ«m|gokigafbafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gogafbafnkerom|gogafbafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gogafbafnkeshĂ«|gogafbafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gogafbafnkeshĂ«m|gogafbafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gogafbafnkeya|gogafbafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gafbafterom|gafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gafbaftemu|gafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gafbafteya|gafbafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokigafbafterom|gokigafbafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokigafbaftemu|gokigafbaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokigafbafteya|gokigafbafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
